Breakpoint.description: Add breakpoint that will pause the execution if any debugger was attached

GetReference.description:
Any data that being passed to this node
will be sent to Console on your DevTools
To open the DevTools you can use CTRL + Shift + I, then go to Console

Log.description:
Display value from a port
Primitive type will be converted into a string
Object will be converted with JSON.stringify

Any.description: Any data type, and can be used for many cable
